stemHtml: During start-up, the pilot notices the unserviceability of an item mentioned in the Minimum Equipment List (MEL). He/she wrongly concludes that this has an impact on the performance of the aircraft. Because of this, the pilot wants to change aircraft settings in the performance database on the FMS. On the INIT page, the pilot...

options.a: can only confirm the current aircraft model and type.
options.b: can select the MEL items that are unserviceable and the FMS will take this into account.
options.c: can only change parameters related to the fuel consumption.
options.d: can select the sub-menu of the performance database and can change whatever data he/she thinks is needed.
